full_text: What is GBrain? My open source project is a knowledge system, not RAG in a box. It gives agents 8 layers that work together to improve memory in a way that makes your already smart OpenClaw or Hermes Agent feel clairvoyant about who you are. ## clean_text

What is GBrain? My open source project is a knowledge system, not RAG in a box. It gives agents 8 layers that work together to improve memory in a way that makes your already smart OpenClaw or Hermes Agent feel clairvoyant about who you are. Personal AI becomes possible. https://t.co/XNVIw5ZfpO President & CEO @ycombinator —Founder @garryslist—Creator of GStack & GBrain—designer/engineer who helps founders—SF Dem accelerating the boom loop likes=1231; retweets=89; replies=80

## full_text

What is GBrain? My open source project is a knowledge system, not RAG in a box. It gives agents 8 layers that work together to improve memory in a way that makes your already smart OpenClaw or Hermes Agent feel clairvoyant about who you are.
